series_metadata.series_description: Annual Audit Plans are developed yearly to determine the audits, internal investigations or performance audits to be completed on a yearly basis. These reports detail the projects completed in the prior fiscal year, as well as the projects forecasted for the coming year.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 3 years following the Auditor of State review. ; Electronic: Same as above, Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
